_doc: Body-segment mass fractions used by V3D's HYBRID_SEGMENT model in theia_model.mdh. Each /MASS parameter is a fraction of total subject mass. The MDH file leaves /MASS commented out (! /MASS=) so V3D applies these defaults internally; values supplied by Joe Marsh on 2026-05-01. Cross-checked sum = 0.9987 (within rounding).

subject._note: MDH (theia_model.mdh line 18) lists 89.8128 kg; user-quoted 89.128 kg appears to be a transcription typo. Use mass_kg_from_mdh for any computation against this trial.

v3d_segment_to_fraction._doc: V3D segment names → mass-fraction key in this file. RAR=right arm, LAR=left arm, RFA=right forearm, LFA=left forearm, RHA=right hand, LHA=left hand, RTA/LTA=right/left thigh, etc. RTX=thorax.
v3d_segment_to_fraction.HEAD: head

computed_for_subject._doc: Mass in kg for THIS subject (89.8128 kg) at each segment.
